chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal Nos. 403, 404, 405, 406, 407 & 408 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ For order as to non-prosecution. 01.12.2025 None present for the Appellants. Ms. Zehrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General. These appeals are pending since 2018. Appellants remain unrepresented today without intimation or justification. These appeals are clogging the docket for more than seven years. It appears that the appellants are not interested in proceeding with these appeals, therefore, the same are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected files. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
